title: Expand stablecoin analytics to multi-token
acceptance_criteria: analytics.ts imports getTokenSupply and getHolderCount from shared rpc-utils instead of inline implementations
GET /v1/data-products/analytics accepts optional ?mints= query param (comma-separated mint addresses)
Defaults to USDC devnet mint (Gh9ZwEmdLJ8DscKNTkTqPbNwLNNBjuSzaG9Vp2KGtKJr) when no mints specified
Returns array of StablecoinEntry objects (one per mint)
Databricks cache layer preserved (analytics_cache query still works)
Mock data fallback preserved and returns array of entries matching requested mints
